claim_boundary.next_gate: Implement the row worker, produce every shard output, assemble each row, and resubmit the four-row F1 artifact.
claim_boundary.what_is_not_supported: No full covariance worker, shard outputs, assembled rows, denominator win, B3 reopen, B10-T1 credit, quantum advantage, or BQP separation is supported.
claim_boundary.what_is_supported: The three blocked LiH/H2O/N2 rows now have replayable full-covariance work orders and shard contracts.

requirements.description: Remaining-row scout is valid and still blocked on P8/P9/P10
Each work order is split into replayable shards
Worker output contract is explicit for every row
Each work order preserves the blocker reasons from the scout
Work-order and shard contract hashes are reproducible
No B3/B10 credit, denominator win, or accepted row is claimed
All shard outputs have been produced
Remaining rows are assembled and ready for F1 acceptance

title: B3/B10 F1 Full Covariance Work Order Gate

work_orders.planning_note: Group count and histogram are planning proxies from the full HF QWC cover; the worker must recompute or verify the compiled-state QWC cover before credit.
